fields.title: Integration testing
fields.description:
## Task

Add unit tests and a small manual checklist for the agent-awareness feature.

## Unit Tests

- Prefer small pure tests (no spawning real pi processes).
- Focus on:
  - `isOverlapping(...)` path cases
  - message injection behavior (prepend last user message; no duplicates)

Suggested location:
- `extensions/tau/test/agent-awareness.test.ts`

## Manual Smoke Test

- Start pi in repo A
- Start second pi in repo A
- Trigger a turn in the first pi and verify it injects `AGENT_CONTEXT: 1 other agent...`
- Close second pi
- Trigger another turn and verify it injects `AGENT_CONTEXT: no other agents detected`

## DoD

- `npm test` in `extensions/tau` passes
fields.close_reason: Added vitest unit tests for overlap detection and message injection
